verdict.note: 'shape' verdict only; named-scheme requires the fingerprint ladder (see fingerprints.json).

named_scheme_verdict.named_scheme_verdict: family F9 (exp/decay) SHAPE without the named RetNet ladder

reasoning.P1_exp_family_wins: CONFIRMED (F9 dominant, agreed verdict, R2 0.90-0.96 local)
reasoning.P3_RoPE_minor_only: CONFIRMED (no dominance; F10_dsin 933 + F7_rope 216 heads, global-concentrated)
reasoning.P4_RetNet_ladder: REJECTED: 0/66 layers show a geometric decay-rate ladder. F9 is the SHAPE, not the RetNet named scheme.
reasoning.ALiBi_ladder_note: 3/66 layers show a slope ladder, but ALiBi shape lost (P2) -> incidental, not ALiBi realized.

named_scheme_verdict.conclusion: Inkling's positional transport is exponential-decay SHAPED (RetNet family) but did NOT realize any classical NAMED scheme: no RetNet retention ladder, ALiBi rejected on curvature, RoPE present only in a minority of global-layer heads. Global layers are heterogeneous (F3_log/F2/F10/F8 mode-0 winners), not one clean family.
